product_overview: Brainzy is an AI-powered academic study companion that helps students ground study materials, ask questions, generate summaries, and practice with flashcards and exam-style quizzes. It streamlines learning workflows around syllabus documents and interactive revision tools.
core_goals: Manage and ground academic syllabus materials for study use
Provide AI tutoring and doubt resolution from loaded papers
Generate summaries, flashcards, and practice exam questions for active recall
Support structured revision and study productivity workflows
Enable students to track and improve study performance over time

features.name: Academic Storage
features.description: Allows students to manage and access uploaded syllabus materials such as papers and study documents.
user_flows: GET /api/lemma?action=listPapers -> Receive 200 with AcademicPaper[] -> Select a paper for study usage
GET /api/lemma?action=listPapers -> Receive 200 with AcademicPaper[] -> Request an unavailable paper via study actions -> Receive empty result or not found behavior
POST /api/lemma with action=createPaper and valid paper data -> Receive 200 with created paper object -> GET /api/lemma?action=listPapers -> Receive 200 including the new paper
POST /api/lemma with action=createPaper and invalid or incomplete paper data -> Receive error response -> Paper is not added to the library

features.name: Doubt Bot
features.description: Provides an AI tutoring assistant for asking questions about loaded academic content.
user_flows: POST /api/lemma with action=askDoubt and a valid question tied to a loaded paper -> Receive 200 with answer or grounding response -> Student reviews the explanation
POST /api/lemma with action=askDoubt and an invalid or unsupported question -> Receive error response or fallback message -> Student retries with a clearer question

features.name: AI Summary Synthesis
features.description: Generates study summaries from academic papers to help students review key concepts quickly.
user_flows: POST /api/lemma with action=generateStudyMaterials for a loaded paper -> Receive 200 with generated summary content -> Student uses the summary for revision
POST /api/lemma with action=generateStudyMaterials for a missing paperId or unsupported paper -> Receive error response -> No summary is generated

features.name: Active Recall Flashcards
features.description: Lists flashcards for a paper and supports difficulty rating for spaced repetition practice.
user_flows: GET /api/lemma?action=listFlashcards&paperId={paperId} -> Receive 200 with Flashcard[] -> Student flips through flashcards and studies terms
GET /api/lemma?action=listFlashcards&paperId={paperId} -> Receive 200 with Flashcard[] -> POST /api/lemma with action=rateFlashcard and difficulty rating -> Receive 200 confirming the rating
GET /api/lemma?action=listFlashcards&paperId={paperId} with an invalid paperId -> Receive error response or empty list -> Student cannot begin flashcard review for that paper
POST /api/lemma with action=rateFlashcard and an invalid flashcard rating payload -> Receive error response -> Rating is not recorded

features.name: Practice Exam
features.description: Lists multiple-choice exam questions for a paper and supports exam-style practice workflows.
user_flows: GET /api/lemma?action=listExamQuestions&paperId={paperId} -> Receive 200 with ExamQuestion[] -> Student answers questions and checks performance

GET /api/lemma?action=listExamQuestions&paperId={paperId} -> Receive 200 with ExamQuestion[] -> POST /api/lemma with action=generateStudyMaterials or exam-related write operation -> Receive 200 with practice content
GET /api/lemma?action=listExamQuestions&paperId={paperId} with an invalid paperId -> Receive error response or empty list -> Student has no questions to practice
POST /api/lemma with an unsupported exam request payload -> Receive error response -> No practice exam content is generated

features.name: Study Timer
features.description: Supports focused study sessions using Pomodoro-style timing for productive revision.
user_flows: POST /api/lemma with action=generateStudyMaterials or related study-session payload -> Receive 200 if session data is accepted -> Student begins a timed focus interval
POST /api/lemma with malformed study-session payload -> Receive error response -> Timer session does not start

features.name: Progress Tracker
features.description: Allows manual logging of study sessions and revision progress for later review.
user_flows: POST /api/lemma with action=generateStudyMaterials or a progress-log payload representing a completed session -> Receive 200 acknowledging the record -> Student sees the session reflected in progress tracking
POST /api/lemma with an invalid progress-log payload -> Receive error response -> Session is not recorded

features.name: Roadmap & Planner
features.description: Helps students schedule revision work into an organized study itinerary.
user_flows: POST /api/lemma with action=generateStudyMaterials or planner-related payload for a study plan -> Receive 200 with generated study material or plan data -> Student uses the output to schedule revision slots
POST /api/lemma with missing or invalid planning data -> Receive error response -> No roadmap entry is created

features.name: Lemma API Integration
features.description: Core API endpoints serving client grounding operations, document list, and doubt queries

endpoints.description: List flashcards for a specific paper
List multiple choice exam questions for a specific paper
Handle write operations such as createPaper, rateFlashcard, askDoubt, or generateStudyMaterials
